title: Ischemic Stroke in a Talapoin Monkey (Miopithecus talapoin).

sections.title: Ischemic Stroke in a Talapoin Monkey (Miopithecus talapoin).
sections.text: A captive senile talapoin monkey (Miopithecus talapoin) developed sudden neurological signs and died within 24 h. Necropsy revealed an extensive infarct in the right hemisphere, from occipital to frontal lobe. Microscopy showed a thrombus, neuronal edema, and necrosis, and arteriosclerosis, characterizing an ischemic stroke.
